summary_facts: Applied AI Engineer and Full-stack Developer focused on local-first LLM systems, agentic RAG platforms, backend AI services, vector retrieval, and practical AI product integration.
Experienced in building end-to-end systems that combine frontend interfaces, backend APIs, database design, AI inference, retrieval pipelines, and product workflows.
Strong interest in system building, performance optimization, local AI deployment, CPU-friendly inference, and turning difficult technical problems into usable software systems.
Built SaaS platforms, backend services, real-time communication features, AI search systems, local RAG pipelines, embedded vector database components, and AI automation workflows.
Comfortable working across product, engineering, and research layers: from gathering requirements and planning features to implementing APIs, optimizing performance, and integrating AI components.
Can contribute to AI Engineer roles through LLM integration, RAG, prompt workflows, tool-calling, OCR/STT/TTS pipelines, vector search, and local model deployment.
Can contribute to Full-stack Developer roles through ReactJS, NextJS, Node.js, ExpressJS, Flask, REST APIs, authentication, authorization, WebSockets, dashboards, and database-backed applications.

Can contribute to Business Analyst or Product Owner roles through requirement gathering, stakeholder communication, competitor research, feature refinement, task breakdown, product thinking, and translating business goals into engineering tasks.
Known for being product-minded, backend-aware, performance-focused, AI-ready, and comfortable taking technical ownership from idea to implementation.
Currently completing a B.S. in Information Technology with a GPA of 3.72/4.00.

ai_engineer: Local-first AI engineer focused on RAG, LLM inference, agent tooling, vector retrieval, and backend AI services.
Able to connect model inference, document processing, speech processing, search, and backend APIs into usable AI product pipelines.
Experienced with CPU-friendly local AI workflows using GGUF models, Qwen models, llama.cpp-style inference, context compression, prompt caching, and local vector search.
Able to work on AI infrastructure, AI product integration, retrieval systems, and automation tools without depending heavily on cloud-only AI services.
fullstack_developer: Full-stack developer focused on SaaS platforms, responsive web applications, backend services, real-time systems, and AI-powered product features.
Able to build frontend dashboards, backend APIs, authentication flows, database schemas, background jobs, WebSocket features, and AI search integration.
Comfortable connecting frontend, backend, data storage, message queues, caching, and AI services into complete working products.
backend_developer: Backend-focused developer experienced with REST APIs, microservices, API Gateway patterns, authentication, authorization, message queues, Redis caching, database design, and service integration.
Able to design maintainable backend services with clear boundaries, structured data flow, and practical deployment considerations.
business_analyst: Technical business analyst profile with experience turning business goals into engineering tasks, supporting product direction through competitor research, and clarifying requirements with clients and team members.
Able to bridge technical and non-technical communication by translating user needs, product ideas, and business constraints into clear features, tasks, and implementation plans.
product_owner: Junior product owner profile with hands-on product-building experience across HRM, healthcare retrieval, AI automation, dashboards, real-time communication, and backend systems.
Able to think from user value, define useful features, prioritize practical implementation, and work closely with engineers to move ideas into working software.

business_product: Translating business needs into engineering tasks

experiences.description: Built backend AI services and AI product pipelines involving LLMs, OCR, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, document workflows, translation workflows, and backend service integration.
bullets: Built backend AI services using LLMs, OCR, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech for translation and document workflow use cases.
Designed microservice-based APIs with clear service boundaries, structured data flow, and maintainable integration patterns.
Connected model inference, document processing, audio processing, and backend services into working product pipelines.
Improved service performance for higher throughput and lower latency in distributed AI service environments.
Built AI features that can be integrated into user-facing applications and internal business tools.
Worked on practical AI workflows where model inference must connect reliably with backend systems and product requirements.
Helped bridge raw AI model capabilities with usable backend services that can be deployed and maintained.

experiences.description: Built and improved responsive web applications, optimized frontend performance, supported product direction, and developed reusable frontend features.
bullets: Built and improved responsive web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies.
Improved data loading speed by 20% and reduced re-rendering time by 30% through caching and frontend optimization.
Developed interactive UI features with attention to performance, accessibility, and user experience.
Supported product direction through competitor research, UI/UX improvements, and feature refinement.
Wrote reusable frontend code to make pages easier to maintain, test, and extend.
Contributed to web application quality by improving interface behavior, loading flow, and maintainability.

experiences.description: Led engineering tasks, worked directly with clients, translated business goals into engineering work, designed backend systems, and delivered custom web applications and smart systems.
bullets: Led a 5-member engineering team across task planning, code review, delivery tracking, and technical execution.
Worked directly with clients to gather requirements and turn business goals into clear engineering tasks.
Partnered with clients to clarify technical requirements, provide architectural consultation, and define implementation direction.
Designed and deployed custom smart systems using Docker for cloud and on-premise environments.
Built scalable backend services and custom web applications using NestJS and ExpressJS.
Designed database schemas and optimized queries across MongoDB and MySQL.
Delivered REST APIs with authentication and authorization using JWT and OAuth2.
Translated high-level product needs into backend modules, database structures, user flows, and development tasks.
Balanced engineering feasibility, client requirements, and delivery constraints while leading implementation.

experiences.company: HUTECH - Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology
experiences.description: Worked on AI research prototypes, data mining algorithms, human activity recognition, signal processing, computer vision, and technical experiments with academic researchers.
bullets: Translated theoretical AI concepts into practical applications by transforming academic models into scalable and reusable engineering prototypes.
Engineered high-performance algorithms for large-scale pattern mining, reducing computational redundancy and improving search efficiency.
Developed end-to-end data pipelines for Human Activity Recognition using Wi-Fi Channel State Information and signal processing techniques.
Implemented and optimized real-time computer vision architectures for multi-object detection and continuous tracking.
Collaborated with PhD and Master-level researchers to design and execute technical experiments across AI, data mining, and signal processing domains.
Worked on benchmark-oriented implementation where runtime, memory usage, and algorithmic efficiency were important evaluation factors.

projects.name: PomaiEm
projects.type: Enterprise SaaS HRM and AI Automation Platform
projects.description: Enterprise HRM SaaS platform with workspace isolation, role-based access control, real-time chat, payroll/reporting background jobs, semantic search, and AI agent automation workflows.
bullets: Built an enterprise HRM platform with microservices, API Gateway, RBAC, workspace isolation, real-time chat, and AI search.
Designed workspace provisioning so different companies and user groups can use separated data, roles, and permissions.
Implemented centralized authentication and authorization with JWT and RBAC for secure access control.
Added RabbitMQ and Redis to handle background jobs such as payroll, reporting, notifications, and AI-assisted automation flows.
Built encrypted real-time chat with WebSockets for one-to-one and group communication.
Added internal semantic search and automation features to help users manage HR information faster.
Integrated PomaiDB, Cheesebrain, and Cheesepath to support local LLM hosting, semantic retrieval, and agent-based workflow automation.
Built AI agent tools that help users automate HR actions such as creating tasks, assigning schedules, creating goals, listing goals, and searching company data.
Designed the platform around practical HR workflows including user management, workspace separation, check-in/check-out, shift scheduling, payroll, reporting, and internal communication.
business_value: Helps companies manage HR data, roles, schedules, payroll-related tasks, communication, and internal knowledge search in one platform.
Demonstrates ability to translate business workflows into software modules, permissions, data models, and automation features.
Useful for CVs targeting Full-stack Developer, Backend Developer, Business Analyst, Product Owner, and AI Product roles.

projects.name: Po-Health
projects.type: Local Drug Retrieval and AI Assistant System
projects.description: Local AI search system for drug retrieval with frontend search UI, backend APIs, local model inference, vector indexing, and assistant-style retrieval workflows.
bullets: Built a fullstack local AI search system for drug retrieval with frontend search UI, backend APIs, local inference, and vector retrieval.
Supported search by both drug name and drug description, making retrieval more useful than simple keyword search.
Connected NextJS frontend, Flask backend, RAG pipeline, local model inference, and PomaiDB indexing into one working product.
Used PomaiDB for local vector search, Cheesebrain for local LLM hosting, and Cheesepath for agent tool orchestration.
Added assistant-style workflows for searching information, preparing structured results, and supporting local automation flows.
Reduced local model memory use by about 20% using a context-squeezing approach.
Reduced drug search time by about 30% through better retrieval logic and local indexing.
Designed the system to run locally, making it more private and easier to deploy in resource-limited environments.
business_value: Demonstrates practical use of AI search in healthcare-like information retrieval workflows.
Shows ability to combine frontend, backend, local AI inference, and vector retrieval into a complete product.
Useful for AI Engineer, Full-stack Developer, Healthcare AI, and AI Product roles.

projects.name: Cheeserag
projects.description: Self-hosted RAG backend connecting local LLM inference, vector search, and agent workflow control for private and resource-conscious AI applications.
bullets: Built a self-hosted RAG backend that connects local LLM inference, vector search, and agent workflow control.
Integrated Cheesebrain for model hosting, PomaiDB for vector storage and retrieval, and Cheesepath for agent orchestration.
Added local tool-calling so the system can search data, run tools, create actions, and answer questions without external services.
Used prompt caching and context compression to reduce repeated computation in long-context workflows.
Designed the platform for private, on-premise, and edge AI use cases where data control and stable performance matter.
Focused on local-first AI workflows where privacy, offline capability, CPU-friendly inference, and low resource usage are important.
Created a foundation for AI tools that can automate tasks, schedule actions, create goals, list goals, retrieve knowledge, and interact with structured backend tools.
business_value: Demonstrates AI infrastructure thinking beyond simple API usage.
Shows ability to build RAG systems, tool-calling workflows, and local AI runtime integration.
Useful for AI Engineer, Backend AI Engineer, LLM Engineer, and RAG Engineer roles.

projects.name: PomaiDB
projects.description: Embedded vector database designed for local, edge, IoT, and cloud-like AI search use cases with memory-conscious indexing and retrieval.
bullets: Built an embedded vector database for local, edge, IoT, and cloud-like AI search.
Designed a custom memory allocator for low-memory high-dimensional embedding search.
Reached about 42.4 MiB peak memory usage in an IoT-style test environment.
Implemented hybrid lexical and vector retrieval for practical RAG applications.
Designed the system as a lightweight alternative to heavy third-party databases for local semantic search.
Focused on low-level performance, memory usage, and zero-dependency deployment for AI search systems.
business_value: Supports AI search and RAG use cases through local vector retrieval.
Useful for AI infrastructure, systems, backend, and database-related roles.

projects.name: Cheesebrain
projects.description: Local LLM inference backend adapted for RAG, OCR, speech, reasoning, prompt caching, and context compression workflows.
bullets: Reworked a local LLM inference engine into a modular backend for RAG, OCR, speech, and reasoning workflows.
Built semantic prompt caching to reduce repeated computation for common prompts and context blocks.
Implemented context compression to make long-context AI workflows more efficient.
Focused on local AI deployment where speed, privacy, and resource usage matter.
Integrated with Cheeserag and PomaiDB as part of a local-first AI system stack.
business_value: Shows capability to work close to AI runtime infrastructure.
Useful for local AI, LLM backend, and AI systems roles.

projects.name: Cheesepath
projects.description: Agent orchestration layer used to connect local LLMs with backend tools, retrieval systems, and structured automation workflows.
bullets: Built orchestration logic for connecting local LLM outputs with backend tools and workflow actions.
Used as part of PomaiEm, Po-Health, and Cheeserag to enable agent-based automation and tool-calling.
Supported workflows such as searching data, creating tasks, assigning schedules, creating goals, listing goals, and preparing structured outputs.
Designed around local-first automation without requiring external AI agent platforms.
business_value: Shows ability to build practical agent tooling instead of only prompting LLMs.
Useful for AI Engineer, Product Engineer, and Backend AI roles.

projects.name: C-DataMiner / dm Framework
projects.type: Pure C99 Data Mining Framework and Benchmarking Environment
projects.description: Open-source data mining framework written in C99 for extracting hidden patterns, frequent itemsets, and association rules from transactional datasets.
bullets: Built a pure C99 data mining framework for extracting hidden patterns, frequent itemsets, and association rules from transactional databases.
Designed a zero-dependency core using custom memory pools, bitsets, hash tables, and FP-Tree-style structures for speed and memory efficiency.
Unified multiple data mining algorithms under a single dynamic interface.
Supported techniques for both vertical and horizontal data formats.
Created a low-level benchmarking environment for sparse and dense datasets.
Integrated high-resolution hardware timers to track wall time, kernel mode time, and peak RAM usage.
Used the framework as an experimentation base for CPU-friendly algorithm design and practical AI research.
business_value: Shows algorithmic thinking, low-level implementation skill, and research-to-code ability.
Useful for AI Engineer, Research Engineer, Systems Engineer, and algorithm-heavy roles.

working_style.description: Designs APIs, data flow, authentication, service boundaries, and database structures with long-term maintainability in mind.

working_style.title: System builder

working_style.title: Challenge-driven
working_style.description: Interested in difficult engineering problems, especially local-first AI, embedded systems, backend infrastructure, and resource-constrained deployment.

allowed_to_use: All facts, skills, projects, experiences, metrics, education, certifications, and role positioning in this JSON profile.
must_not_invent: Do not invent new job titles.
Do not invent user counts, revenue, funding, production scale, or enterprise clients unless explicitly present in this profile.
Do not claim expert-level mastery unless the JD and profile strongly support it.
Do not overstate Junior-level applications as Senior-level experience.
rewrite_behavior: Select only the most relevant facts for the target JD.
Reorder skills based on JD keywords.
Prefer evidence-backed skills from projects and experience.
For AI Engineer roles, prioritize LLM, RAG, local inference, vector retrieval, AI backend services, and AI systems projects.
For Full-stack roles, prioritize ReactJS, NextJS, Node.js, ExpressJS, Flask, REST APIs, SaaS platforms, authentication, WebSockets, dashboards, and database work.
For Backend roles, prioritize API design, microservices, authentication, databases, Redis, RabbitMQ, WebSockets, service boundaries, and performance.
For Business Analyst roles, prioritize requirement gathering, client communication, competitor research, product workflows, task breakdown, and translating business goals into engineering tasks.
For Product Owner roles, prioritize product thinking, feature refinement, workflow design, business value, user value, task planning, and cross-functional communication.
